title: List Payment Agents Response
description: Paginated list of payment agents matching the supplied filters. Commission fields reflect the rates for the currency used in the query.

data.description: Payment agent list items sorted by agent ID ascending.

items.description: Payment agent summary as returned by the list endpoint.

id.description: Unique identifier of the payment agent. Pass this as `agent_id` to the withdraw endpoint.

created_at.description: Epoch timestamp (milliseconds) when the agent was registered.

is_listed.description: Whether the agent appears in the public agent directory. `false` indicates this agent was included because you've previously received a transfer from them, not because they're publicly listed.

name.description: Display name of the payment agent.

information.description: Free-text description of the agent's services and operating details.

email.description: Contact email address of the payment agent.

payment_methods.description: Payment methods accepted by this agent (e.g. `bank_transfer`, `mobile_money`).

countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes in lowercase in which this agent operates.

deposit_commission.description: Commission rate for deposits in the queried currency.

withdrawal_commission.description: Commission rate for withdrawals in the queried currency.

withdrawal_minimum.description: Minimum withdrawal amount as a decimal string for the queried currency.

withdrawal_maximum.description: Maximum withdrawal amount as a decimal string for the queried currency.

metadata.description: Request metadata included in every response.

method.description: The HTTP method used for the request.

timing.description: Time in seconds for the service to process the request.
